emails.subject_base: March 2000 Activity ; Enichem Elastomers Americas, Inc.
emails.body: March 2000 Activity Enichem Elastomers Americas, Inc. I have been told this counterparty has scheduled some maintenance for March 22nd through March 23rd or 24th. HPL is selling them 2.0/day Sitara 92794. The 2.0/d is the only activity at the meter. Please advise.

emails.body: Re: March 2000 Activity Enichem Elastomers Americas, Inc. There is no buy-back we are their only pipeline supplier and it is a requirements deal. From: Robert E Lloyd 03/21/2000 09:12 AM
